word: H8602 - תָּפֵל - tâphêl - taw-fale' - Foolish things

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּפל

Transliteration: tâphêl

Phonetic: taw-fale'

BDB Definition:

  1. foolish, insipid (adjective)
  2. (BDB) tasteless, unseasoned (adjective)
  3. whitewash (noun masculine)
    1. meaning uncertain

Origin: from an unused root meaning to smear

TWOT entry: 2534a,2535a

Part(s) of speech:
